# On the Nature of Things

*[Lucretius](../philosophers/lucretius.md) · 55 BCE · *De rerum natura**

A vast didactic poem in six books in which Lucretius sets out Epicurean physics and ethics in Latin, from the [clinamen](../glossary/clinamen.md) of the atoms to the dissolution of the soul. Its avowed aim is to free human beings from the fear of the gods and of death.
